$description: Per-demo canonical e2e suggestion. Consumed by demos (useConfigureSuggestions), e2e specs (pill-click test), and Phase 2 blitz agents. Every entry's message MUST appear as a fixture in d5-all.json with a matching response. Messages are kept substring-disjoint from every other fixture and from a curated noise list — see showcase/scripts/validate-fixture-overlap.ts.

agentic-chat-reasoning.title: Show reasoning
agentic-chat-reasoning.message: show your reasoning step by step
agentic-chat-reasoning.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Custom reasoning slot renders the reasoning-block testid.

a2ui-fixed-schema.title: Block calendar
a2ui-fixed-schema.message: block out my tuesday with three meetings and a gym slot
a2ui-fixed-schema.notes: Fixture returns an a2ui JSON tree which the fixed-catalog renderer materializes.

agent-config.title: Personalize tone
agent-config.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Demo asserts on config card; chat is secondary.

agentic-chat.title: Goldfish name
agentic-chat.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Plain content response into chat surface.

auth.title: Auth check
auth.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Auth banner is the primary observable; chat works once authenticated.

beautiful-chat.title: Pasta night
beautiful-chat.message: suggest a vegetarian pasta dinner for four guests
beautiful-chat.notes: Beautiful chat is a presentation demo — content response is fine.

byoc-hashbrown.title: Sales overview
byoc-hashbrown.message: sketch the sales overview with quarterly bars
byoc-hashbrown.notes: Hashbrown renderer materializes JSON-of-components from content.

byoc-json-render.title: Marketing overview
byoc-json-render.message: outline a marketing overview with traffic breakdown
byoc-json-render.notes: Json-render-renderer materializes assistant JSON content into UI.

chat-customization-css.title: Theme check
chat-customization-css.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. CSS scoping is the observable; content works.

chat-slots.title: Slot wiring
chat-slots.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Custom assistant message slot is the observable.

declarative-gen-ui.title: Show card
declarative-gen-ui.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Declarative gen-ui materializes a card from descriptor.

frontend-tools.title: Switch theme
frontend-tools.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Frontend tool dispatched client-side; bg flips.

frontend-tools-async.title: Async metric
frontend-tools-async.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Async tool resolves and forwards result.

gen-ui-agent.title: Launch outline
gen-ui-agent.message: lay out a five-stage launch outline for our beta product
gen-ui-agent.notes: Agent state card shows step progression; content prompts the agent to populate state.

gen-ui-interrupt.title: Pause and pick
gen-ui-interrupt.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Gen-ui interrupt pauses and renders choice.

gen-ui-tool-based.title: Quarterly bars
gen-ui-tool-based.message: render a tool-based bar chart for last quarter deliveries
gen-ui-tool-based.notes: Tool-call response invokes the demo's bar-chart tool registered via useComponent.

headless-complete.title: Custom message
headless-complete.message: send a sample message to populate the headless transcript
headless-complete.notes: Headless demo doesn't render suggestions — catalog message used by Phase 2 e2e to type.

headless-simple.title: Card body
headless-simple.message: show a small card body about hummingbirds
headless-simple.notes: Headless-simple uses textarea — pill UX not present. Phase 2 will type this.

hitl.title: Sourcing route
hitl.message: draft a five-stage route for sourcing office greenery
hitl.notes: Tool call returns generate_task_steps; demo renders selectable steps.

hitl-in-app.title: Refund approval
hitl-in-app.message: process a refund for the late delivery ticket
hitl-in-app.notes: Tool call triggers in-app approval modal.

hitl-in-chat.title: Pick a slot
hitl-in-chat.message: set up a quick demo call with the design folks
hitl-in-chat.notes: Tool call renders an inline time-picker card inside the chat.

interrupt-headless.title: Headless interrupt
interrupt-headless.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Interrupt resolved with yes follow-up.

mcp-apps.title: Excalidraw
mcp-apps.message: draw an excalidraw diagram of a router with two switches
mcp-apps.notes: MCP app exercises Excalidraw tool through the runtime.

multimodal.title: Sample image
multimodal.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Multimodal binary upload round-trip.

open-gen-ui.title: Open block
open-gen-ui.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Open gen-ui materializes arbitrary JSON.

open-gen-ui-advanced.title: Advanced flow
open-gen-ui-advanced.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Continues from a prior turn.

prebuilt-popup.title: Popup hello
prebuilt-popup.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Popup wired and reachable.

prebuilt-sidebar.title: Sidebar hello
prebuilt-sidebar.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Sidebar wired and reachable.

readonly-state-agent-context.title: Recall pref
readonly-state-agent-context.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Read-only context flows to the agent.

reasoning-default-render.title: Default reasoning
reasoning-default-render.message: talk me through your default reasoning on a tricky riddle
reasoning-default-render.notes: Default reasoning slot — distinct from agentic-chat-reasoning's custom override.

shared-state-read.title: Italian pasta
shared-state-read.message: compose an italian pasta recipe with seasonal greens
shared-state-read.notes: Recipe output reflects shared read-state preferences.

shared-state-read-write.title: Weekend plan
shared-state-read-write.message: build me a weekend itinerary based on saved interests
shared-state-read-write.notes: Read-write demo updates shared state; content carries the plan.

shared-state-streaming.title: Stream counter
shared-state-streaming.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Counter streams 0→5 via shared state.

subagents.title: Research draft
subagents.message: Research the benefits of remote work and draft a one-paragraph summary
subagents.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Multi-turn sub-agent: research → write → critique.

tool-rendering.title: Pie chart
tool-rendering.message: Show me a pie chart of revenue by category
tool-rendering.notes: Existing fixture in d5-all.json — reused. Tool-call render_pie_chart.

tool-rendering-custom-catchall.title: Custom catchall
tool-rendering-custom-catchall.message: exercise the custom catchall renderer with an unknown tool
tool-rendering-custom-catchall.notes: Tool call uses an unregistered tool name to fall through to custom catch-all.

tool-rendering-default-catchall.title: Default catchall
tool-rendering-default-catchall.message: trigger the default catchall renderer for an unmapped tool
tool-rendering-default-catchall.notes: Tool call falls through to the default catch-all card.

tool-rendering-reasoning-chain.title: Kyoto itinerary
tool-rendering-reasoning-chain.message: draft a 3-day kyoto itinerary with a 1500 dollar budget
tool-rendering-reasoning-chain.notes: Reasoning chain interleaves multi-step tool calls; content path keeps the assertion stable.

voice.title: Voice transcript
voice.message: transcribe my voice memo about wednesday standup notes
voice.notes: Voice demo's primary path is STT — pill is fallback for the text-flow assertion.
